reflexion_entries_to_archive: P1 #drop-orphaned-save #dead-write-removal #blueprint-confirms-no-resume-both-modes #grok-no-fud #skipped-disproportionate-boot-smoke: dropped saveToLocalStorage (the PLAYING->POSTGAME localStorage write, write-only since loadFromLocalStorage was removed S67).
